Name: Deployable Founder Repository
Exit Gate: Repository deploys and deployment report is opened

Name: Starter Equations Across Required Domains
Exit Gate: Each required domain has Rust calculation plus test plus Codex ID

Name: Source Verification Alpha
Exit Gate: Every starter entry has source review task and source registry record

Name: Multi-Domain Trust Loop
Exit Gate: Several domains appear in generated validation reports

Name: Numerics and Units Hardening
Exit Gate: Public API eliminates ambiguous units and branches where possible

Name: Agentic Vertical Slice
Exit Gate: One calculation can be discovered invoked traced verified and replayed

Name: Research Preview
Exit Gate: Clean checkout reproduces examples and reports

Name: Engineering Alpha
Exit Gate: Major categories have source-reviewed internal APIs

Name: Beta Candidate
Exit Gate: Stable v1 surface proposed and architecture blockers closed

Name: Release Candidate
Exit Gate: API freeze candidate and release evidence report complete

Name: First Stable Verified Core
Exit Gate: Bounded stable API ships with evidence report and caveats
